'''zaforo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:caballo|caballo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caballo|caballo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zaforo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæfereth|zæfereth]] || [[word:zæferej|zæferej]] || [[word:zæferesh|zæferesh]] || [[word:zæfere|zæfere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zafoforoth|zafoforoth]] || [[word:zafoforoj|zafoforoj]] || [[word:zafoforosh|zafoforosh]] || [[word:zafoforo|zafoforo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zaforoth|zaforoth]] || [[word:zaforoj|zaforoj]] || [[word:zaforosh|zaforosh]] || [[word:zaforo|zaforo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zafofroth|zafofroth]] || [[word:zafofroj|zafofroj]] || [[word:zafofrosh|zafofrosh]] || [[word:zafofrof|zafofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zaforotho|zaforotho]] || [[word:zaforojo|zaforojo]] || [[word:zaforosho|zaforosho]] || [[word:zaforoko|zaforoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zaforoth|zaforoth]] || [[word:zaforoj|zaforoj]] || [[word:zaforosh|zaforosh]] || [[word:zaforo|zaforo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zaforothol|zaforothol]] || [[word:zaforojol|zaforojol]] || [[word:zaforoshol|zaforoshol]] || [[word:zaforokol|zaforokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zaforothotho|zaforothotho]] || [[word:zaforojojo|zaforojojo]] || [[word:zaforoshosho|zaforoshosho]] || [[word:zaforoko|zaforoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zaforothon|zaforothon]] || [[word:zaforojon|zaforojon]] || [[word:zaforoshon|zaforoshon]] || [[word:zaforokon|zaforokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zaforothoro|zaforothoro]] || [[word:zaforojoro|zaforojoro]] || [[word:zaforoshoro|zaforoshoro]] || [[word:zaforokoro|zaforokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
